skill.name: canvas-design
skill.description: Create beautiful visual art in PNG and PDF documents using design philosophy and aesthetic movements.
skill.summary: Transform ideas into museum-quality visual art through a two-step process: first creating a design philosophy, then expressing it as stunning visual compositions.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill contains only documentation and instructions for AI-driven visual design work. Static analysis flagged 100+ patterns as potential issues, but all are false positives: URLs are license references in OFL/Apache license files, 'cryptographic algorithm' matches are text in license legalese not actual crypto code, and 'system reconnaissance' patterns are standard license preamble text. The skill has no executable code, makes no network calls, and poses no security risk.

content.user_title: Create museum-quality visual art and posters
content.value_statement: Transform abstract ideas into stunning visual compositions through a structured design philosophy approach. This skill guides Claude to create professional-grade PDF and PNG artwork that combines artistic vision with meticulous craftsmanship.
actual_capabilities: Creates comprehensive design philosophies as markdown documents that define aesthetic movements
Generates museum-quality PDF and PNG visual compositions with sophisticated layouts
Applies bundled professional fonts (20+ OFL-licensed typefaces) for typography
Expresses abstract concepts through visual elements like color, form, space, and composition
Creates multi-page coffee table book style outputs when requested
Refines and polishes existing designs to achieve pristine craftsmanship
limitations: Output limited to PNG and PDF formats only - cannot create other file types
Text in designs must remain minimal - not suitable for text-heavy documents
Requires clear creative direction for best results - vague requests may produce generic outputs
Cannot modify or create new font files - limited to the 20 bundled typefaces

use_cases.title: Marketing Poster Creation
use_cases.description: Generate sophisticated promotional posters for events, products, or campaigns with museum-quality design aesthetics.

use_cases.title: Artistic Concept Exploration
use_cases.description: Transform abstract ideas, themes, or references into tangible visual art pieces for creative projects.

use_cases.title: Brand Identity Development
use_cases.description: Create cohesive visual philosophy documents and sample compositions that define a brand's aesthetic direction.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Poster Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster for [event/product/theme] using a [style descriptor, e.g., 'minimalist Swiss' or 'bold brutalist'] aesthetic. Focus on [key visual element] and keep text minimal but impactful.

prompt_templates.title: Artistic Interpretation
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a visual composition that captures the essence of [abstract concept, e.g., 'melancholy' or 'innovation']. Use the canvas-design workflow to first establish a design philosophy, then express it as a museum-quality artwork with sophisticated use of color, form, and space.

prompt_templates.title: Reference-Infused Art
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an art piece that subtly incorporates [specific reference, e.g., 'Bauhaus principles' or 'jazz improvisation']. The reference should be a quiet conceptual thread woven into the composition - noticeable to those who recognize it, but still beautiful as an abstract piece. Follow the full design philosophy and canvas creation workflow.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Page Coffee Table Book
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a multi-page visual narrative exploring [theme]. Create a unifying design philosophy, then generate [N] distinct but cohesive pages that tell a story together. Each page should be a standalone masterpiece while contributing to the overall aesthetic journey. Output as a single PDF or multiple PNGs.

output_examples.input: Create a poster for a jazz festival with a minimalist aesthetic
output_examples.output: Design philosophy document (.md) defining 'Chromatic Improvisation' movement emphasizing color fields, rhythmic spacing, and musical visual language. Final PDF poster featuring bold color zones, sparse elegant typography, and abstract geometric forms that evoke musical rhythm without literal instrument imagery.

output_examples.input: Design art capturing the concept of 'urban solitude'
output_examples.output: Philosophy markdown exploring 'Concrete Meditation' aesthetic with emphasis on isolation through negative space and cool tones. PNG artwork showing vast empty areas, single architectural elements, and restrained typography positioned with surgical precision.

best_practices: Always complete both workflow steps: design philosophy first, then visual expression - the philosophy guides cohesive aesthetic decisions
Push text to the absolute minimum needed for meaning - let color, form, and space carry the message
When refining, enhance existing elements rather than adding new ones - cohesion beats complexity
anti_patterns: Avoid cluttering compositions with too many elements - sophistication comes from restraint and intentional spacing
Never use decorative text or paragraphs in the visual output - words function as visual accents only
Do not create literal or cartoony interpretations - always pursue abstract, gallery-worthy sophistication

faq.question: What file formats does this skill produce?
faq.answer: The skill outputs PNG and PDF files for visual compositions, plus markdown (.md) files for design philosophies. Font files are bundled for use within compositions but are not modified.

faq.question: Can I use my own fonts instead of the bundled ones?
faq.answer: This skill includes 20 professionally curated OFL-licensed fonts covering diverse aesthetics. It cannot load external fonts, but the bundled collection spans serif, sans-serif, display, and monospace options suitable for most design needs.

faq.question: How specific should my creative brief be?
faq.answer: Provide a clear theme, concept, or reference point along with any style preferences (minimalist, bold, organic, etc.). The skill will generate a unique design philosophy and interpret it creatively while honoring your direction.

faq.question: Can I request revisions if the design isn't what I envisioned?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow includes a refinement step specifically for polishing and cohesive enhancement. Provide specific feedback about what feels off, and the skill will refine existing elements rather than starting over.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for commercial projects?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill is licensed under Apache 2.0, and the bundled fonts use SIL Open Font License 1.1, both of which permit commercial use. Generated artwork is yours to use as needed.

faq.question: What makes this different from generic image generation?
faq.answer: Unlike AI image generators that produce raster graphics, this skill creates sophisticated vector-based PDF/PNG compositions with intentional typography, systematic layouts, and a documented design philosophy - resulting in professional, editable, scalable artwork.
